agent_contract.state_model: commands are deterministic and may be rerun from the repository root

boundaries: Research-only static analysis. Not investment advice. This tool does not fetch live data, connect to brokers, place orders, recommend buys, sells, holds, target allocations, or trades, predict returns, or produce personalized financial advice.

phases.gate: fixture-doctor status is pass before packet generation.
phases.goal: Confirm local static inputs and public docs are present.

phases.gate: review-ledger has no blocker findings before sharing.
phases.goal: Build the evidence packet and reusable public surfaces.
required_inputs: static CSV rows or bundled examples

phases.gate: public-readiness can evaluate all required demo artifacts.
phases.goal: Prepare public visitor and agent reuse artifacts.

phases.gate: selfcheck, public-scan, public-readiness, and diff-check exit successfully.
phases.goal: Run local release gates and detect drift.

purpose: Reusable local protocol for agents generating static macro-policy evidence maps.
stop_conditions: public-scan reports a private reference or credential-shaped token.
title: Workflow Protocol
